name: spritecut-sample-pack
description: Tiny safe fixtures for smoke-testing SpriteCut skill commands.

files.misaligned_sheet.png: Transparent 64x48 sheet with off-grid colored sprite blocks.
files.palette_swap_request.json: IDE API palette.swap request using relative input and output paths.
files.autotile_request.json: IDE API autotile.generate request using relative input and output paths.
